steps.title: Focus on the goal
steps.content: The student wants an example of a vegetable that contains vitamin C. The notes say asparagus is a vegetable, contains ascorbic acid, and ascorbic acid is vitamin C.

steps.title: Name the example
steps.content: A and D discuss how humans get vitamin C but name no specific vegetable. B focuses on animals and human bodies. The choice that names asparagus and identifies vitamin C meets the goal. The answer is C.
